summary: Frontend testing for My Creations tab video display. All 4 test cases PASSED: Login flow works, My creations tab shows user videos, Console shows FETCH_VIDEOS logs, Videos display in grid.
passed_tests: Login flow - Successfully logged in with test@example.com / testpass123
My creations tab - Found and clicked creations tab, videos loaded
FETCH_VIDEOS logs - Console shows '[FETCH_VIDEOS] Fetching for user: user_ac6fd6a1d782' and '[FETCH_VIDEOS] Received 3 videos'
Video grid display - 3 video cards displayed with poster images in creations-grid-real
seed_data_creation: Used existing 3 completed videos for user_ac6fd6a1d782
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Creations tab video display is working correctly. Login with test@example.com/testpass123, click 'My creations' tab, and 3 videos are displayed in a grid. The fetchUserVideos function correctly fetches videos from /api/videos/user/{user_id} and updates the userVideos state. Console logs show [FETCH_VIDEOS] messages for debugging.

login_flow.method: Email login via 'Continue with Email' button
